feedback.text: Please consider including the protection and preservation of videogames as part of the Digital Fairness Act. As gaming has become an integral part of our cultural heritage, it is essential that we take steps to ensure the long-term preservation of these interactive experiences. Videogames are a significant part of our shared history, with many classic games already lost due to obsolete technology and lack of accessibility. The phenomenon of "digital decay", sometimes intentionally produced by game publishers seeking profit or cost cutting is steadily eroding the shared cultural capital that videogames represent. Please, help stopping this.
